heading: North Dakota
label: 114 North Dakota
text: North Dakota constitutes one judicial district.Court shall be held at Bismarck, Fargo, Grand Forks, and Minot.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 114, , ; , , , which provided that North Dakota consisted of one judicial district comprising four divisions, was repealed by , , .act June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 886Pub.
